dateline: Hawthorne, CA / Boca Chica, TX — May 2002–Present
heroHeadline: SpaceX Strikes $60B Cursor AI Deal — 50 Orbital Launches in 2026; Starship IFT-12 Targeting May
heroSubtitle: 8,754 days of reusability milestones — $60B option to acquire Anysphere (Cursor AI) announced Apr 23; GPS III SV-10 'Hedy Lamarr' launched Apr 21 (final GPS III satellite, 49th 2026 launch); Starlink 17-14 Apr 22 = 50th orbital launch of 2026; 600th booster landing Apr 19; Booster 19 + Ship 39 ready for IFT-12 stacking (May 2026); SpaceX IPO S-1 process ongoing for June 2026 Nasdaq debut
footerNote: Data sourced from SpaceX.com, FAA, NASA, SpaceNews, NASASpaceflight.com, Spaceflight Now, Teslarati, TeslaOracle, CNBC, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, TIME, Space.com, Inside GNSS, Northrop Grumman, Yahoo Finance
